news.title: COHR Q4 Deep Dive: AI Data Center Demand and Capacity Expansion Drive Mixed Market Response
news.summary: Materials and photonics company Coherent (NYSE:COHR) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q4 CY2025, with sales up 17.5% year on year to $1.69 billion. On top of that, next quarter’s revenue guidance ($1.77 billion at the midpoint) was surprisingly good and 3.4% above what analysts were expecting. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.29 per share was 7% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

news.title: After 164% Gain Over the Past Year, Coherent Reports Earnings Today
news.summary: Coherent Inc (NYSE: COHR) reports FY2026 Q2 earnings today after market close, with Wall Street expecting the optical components supplier to extend its five-quarter beat streak amid surging AI datacenter demand. Analysts forecast EPS of $1.22 on revenue of $1.64 billion, representing an approximately 14% year-over-year (YOY) growth. Shares have surged more than 21% year-to-date ... After 164% Gain Over the Past Year, Coherent Reports Earnings Today

news.title: Coherent (NYSE:COHR) Posts Better-Than-Expected Sales In Q4 CY2025, Stock Soars
news.summary: Materials and photonics company Coherent (NYSE:COHR) reported Q4 CY2025 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 17.5% year on year to $1.69 billion. On top of that, next quarter’s revenue guidance ($1.77 billion at the midpoint) was surprisingly good and 3.4% above what analysts were expecting. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.29 per share was 7% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

news.title: Coherent Q2 Adj. EPS $1.29 Beats $1.21 Estimate, Sales $1.686B Beat $1.639B Estimate
news.summary: Coherent (NYSE:COHR) reported quarterly earnings of $1.29 per share which beat the analyst consensus estimate of $1.21 by 6.79 percent. This is a 35.79 percent increase over earnings of $0.95 per share from the same

news.title: Coherent Shines at Q2 Earnings: Should Investors Buy the Stock Now?
news.summary: COHR posts 17.5% revenue and 35.8% EPS growth YoY in Q2 FY26, with datacenter & communications driving 72% of sales and margins expanding.

news.title: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on Coherent, Raises Price Target to $245
news.summary: JP Morgan  analyst Samik Chatterjee   maintains Coherent (NYSE:COHR) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $215 to $245.

news.title: Stifel Reiterates Buy on Coherent, Raises Price Target to $235
news.summary: Stifel  analyst Ruben Roy   reiterates Coherent (NYSE:COHR) with a Buy and raises the price target from $220 to $235.

news.title: Coherent Pivots to Next Gen Manufacturing in a Massive Bid to Capture AI Hypergrowth
news.summary: Coherent Corp (COHR) stock trading under pressure despite upbeat Q2 results. Rosenblatt and Needham analysts reaffirm Buy ratings with higher targets.

news.title: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Coherent, Raises Price Target to $235
news.summary: Barclays  analyst Tom O'Malley   maintains Coherent (NYSE:COHR) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $215 to $235.

news.title: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Coherent, Raises Price Target to $200
news.summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Meta Marshall   maintains Coherent (NYSE:COHR) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $190 to $200.
